approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code, ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ) as resign_code_name, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.share_stock, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.fund_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.dep_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.dep_int, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.emer_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.emer_int, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.norm_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.norm_int, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.spec_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.spec_int, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.tran_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.return_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.return_fund, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.coll_bal, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.norm_bf, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.emer_bf, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.spec_bf, pka_com_function.fp_login_id() as entry_id, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as sysdate_tdate FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '068137' /*WHERE*/ -- and ( ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date between '01/04/2020' and '29/04/2020' ) ) order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_member_resign_report_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.new_contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no) as group_collateral_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no) as memname_collateral, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.loan_transfer_amount, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_balance FROM sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no = sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ and ( ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_date = {0} ) AND ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type = {1} ) )
